technology: Expo React Native design system components
abstract: Parameterized templates that scaffold Expo / React Native design system components which obey the expo-design-system rules by construction — Unistyles v3 variants instead of style props, no raw style escape hatch, ref-as-prop, design tokens, and built-in accessibility. Covers a variant pressable primitive, a slot-based card surface, a typed text primitive, a labeled form field, a FlashList entity screen, a theme token group, and a Storybook variant catalog. Each template cites the expo-design-system rule IDs it satisfies, so generated components match the rule pack without rework.
